title: RainbowMC
description:
RainbowMC is a modpack where everything can be automated.
You can almost do everything without exploring. If you love "Satisfactory" you would probably like this pack.
A lot of QoL/performance mods is in this pack for you to feel the best in game.
body:
**RainbowMC** is a modpack where everything can be automated.

You can almost do everything without exploring. If you love *Satisfactory* you would probably like this pack.

A lot of QoL/performance mods is in this pack for you to feel the best in game.

The modpack is currently played by a group of players for upgrading it and making it the most enjoyable to play possible. There are a lot of features that we'll add with always keeping in mind we want a modpack where everything can be automated.
